# Clanky

> Clanky is a stateful personal AI agent built on the Pi runtime, with Discord text + voice, scoped memory, subagents, and AgentRoom integration.

## Start

- [Start Here](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=start-here): A new-user map of Clanky, the Pi foundation, profiles, connectors, and the docs path.
- [Overview](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=overview): Clanky's operating model, setup paths, bundled skills, and local development entry points.
- [Pi Foundation](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=pi-foundation): What Clanky inherits from Pi, what Clanky adds, and why Pi commands still matter.

## Setup

- [First-Time Setup](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=first-time-setup): Install, fresh-user onboarding, persistent profiles, model auth, and optional connector setup.
- [Configuration Model](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=configuration): Profile-local source-of-truth, TUI editor, env override, and AgentRoom boundary rules.
- [Using Clanky](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=using-clanky): Day-to-day TUI, memory, Discord, voice, web/media, AgentRoom, skills, and MCP workflows.

## Operations

- [AgentRoom Integration](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=agentroom): Room participation, gateway ownership, launch contract, and runtime environment boundaries.
- [Live Gates](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=live-gates): Credentialed checks for model auth, Discord text and voice, Linear, xAI media, and AgentRoom launch.
- [Discord Voice Live Runbook](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=discord-voice-live-runbook): Preflight and copyable live validation commands for Discord voice, media, and Go Live checks.

## Reference

- [Command Reference](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=command-reference): CLI commands, inherited Pi slash commands, Clanky slash commands, and tool families.
- [Memory And Privacy](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=memory-and-privacy): Profile-local state, credential storage, memory policy, Discord boundaries, and voice logs.
- [Troubleshooting](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=troubleshooting): Profile, auth, Discord, voice, web, media, MCP, AgentRoom, and docs build fixes.

## Advanced

- [Discord Voice Architecture](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=discord-voice-architecture): End-to-end control-plane, media-plane, Realtime, and Pi delegation flow for Clanky's Discord voice agent.

## Maintainer

- [Memory Plan (archived)](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=memory-plan): Historical profile-local memory direction and implementation notes.
- [v1 Plan (archived)](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=plan): Historical v1 daemon architecture, package layout, roadmap, and success criteria.
- [v1 Audit (archived)](https://volpestyle.github.io/clanky/?doc=v1-audit): Historical prompt-to-artifact checklist, roadmap audit, and live gate preflight evidence.
